strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
3x2 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 21min

hypertrophy.reasoning: Push-heavy day taxed chest/triceps; 1-mile run fatigued legs; antagonist work promotes recovery and balance.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: 1-Mile Run. Workout. For hypertrophy, focus on back, rear delts, biceps.
